story.soThat: all functions use the same naming convention
story.tasks: - Implement ArchiveNamingService (AC: #1, #2, #3, #4) - Create ArchiveNamingService class - Implement GetArchiveName method - Add application name validation - Format date as YYYYMMDD - Create unit tests (AC: #5) - Test AppName="MyApp", Date=2025-10-08 returns "MyApp-20251008.zip" - Test app name with spaces preserved - Test invalid filename characters handled appropriately - Test date formatting is consistent

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. Generates pattern: AppName-YYYYMMDD.zip 2. Accepts application name and date parameters 3. Returns filename string 4. Validates application name (no invalid filename characters) 5. Unit tests validate naming consistency

docs.doc: ArchiveNamingService: Internal Service to generate archive filenames (AppName-YYYYMMDD.zip). Inputs: AppName, Date. Outputs: Archive filename. Foundation Layer component.
- AppName="MyApp" + Date=2025-10-08 → "MyApp-20251008.zip" - AppName with spaces "My App" + Date=2025-10-08 → "My App-20251008.zip" (spaces preserved)

Foundation layer with no dependencies. Used by FR002 (Test-ArchiveExists), FR005 (Compress-Logs), FR006 (Send-Archive). Simple utility function with fixed filename pattern. Date format: YYYYMMDD (no separators).

artifact.reason: Example of Foundation layer service pattern - ArchiveNamingService should follow similar structure

constraints.constraint: Foundation layer - NO dependencies on other services or cmdlets
Service class must be < 500 lines (simple utility)
Single responsibility: archive filename generation only
Date format: YYYYMMDD (no separators, hyphens, or slashes)
Application name spaces are PRESERVED (not replaced)
Validate application name for invalid filename characters

tests.standards: xUnit framework with [Fact] and [Theory] attributes. Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. 100% code coverage target for Foundation layer. Test naming: MethodName_Scenario_ExpectedResult

ideas.test: Test app name with spaces "My App", Date=2025-10-08 returns "My App-20251008.zip"
Test invalid filename characters (e.g., AppName contains \ / : * ? " < > |) throws or sanitizes
Test date formatting is YYYYMMDD with no separators
Test naming consistency across multiple calls with same inputs
Test null or empty AppName throws ArgumentException
Test various date values (leap year, end of month, etc.)
